remaining_tasks.name: Wave 0 — Test scaffolds + install backend deps (Plan 01)
Wave 1a — FastAPI backend skeleton: app, health, serve CLI, Pydantic schemas (Plan 02)
Wave 1b — React/TS frontend scaffold: Vite, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, sidebar, API types (Plan 03)
Wave 3 — API data routes (scan/latest, findings, certs, cbom) + executive/findings/certs pages (Plan 04)
Wave 4 — CBOM table+graph page + migration roadmap Cytoscape.js page (Plan 05)

decisions.decision: Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
decisions.rationale: Agreed in discussion session — lightweight, matches existing tooling

decisions.decision: PDF export via Playwright headless print with graceful 503 fallback
decisions.rationale: Avoids wkhtmltopdf dependency; Python ecosystem fit

decisions.decision: Plans 02 + 03 execute in parallel (Wave 1) — independent work streams
decisions.rationale: Python backend vs JS frontend have no shared files at scaffold stage

decisions.decision: CBOM visualization with Cytoscape.js bipartite graph
decisions.rationale: Defined in UI-SPEC; algorithm→system relationship mapping

next_action: Run /gsd:execute-phase to begin Phase 05 execution — starts at Wave 0 (Plan 01: test scaffolds + deps), then waves 1-4 in order
context_notes: Full planning cycle for Phase 05 completed this session. Phase 04 also completed this session. All 6 plans are written, checker-reviewed, and wave-ordered correctly. STATE.md says 'stopped_at: Phase 5 UI-SPEC approved' — update to 'executing' when execution begins.
